State.title: State
State.description: Represents a state in India, containing information about its heritage, cuisine, festivals, and culture.

id.description: Unique identifier for the State entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the state's history, geography, and culture.

traditionalCuisine.description: List of traditional cuisine dishes from the state.

majorFestivals.description: List of major festivals celebrated in the state.

localArtForms.description: List of local art forms and cultural practices of the state.

imageUrls.description: List of URLs for images representing the state.

Monument.title: Monument
Monument.description: Represents a historical or cultural monument located in India.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Monument entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the monument's history, architecture, and significance.

builtYear.description: Year in which the monument was built.

architecturalStyle.description: The architectural style of the monument.

imageUrls.description: List of URLs for images representing the monument.

UserSearchHistory.title: UserSearchHistory
UserSearchHistory.description: Represents a user's search query and the corresponding timestamp.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserSearchHistory entity.

searchTerm.description: The search query entered by the user.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the search was performed.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Bharat Darshan website.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

dateJoined.description: Date when the user joined the platform.

definition.description: Collection to store information about Indian states.
Subcollection to store information about monuments within each state. Includes denormalized 'stateId' to enforce integrity.
Collection to store user profile information.
Subcollection to store user search history. Enforces path-based ownership: only the user can access their own history.

params.name: searchHistoryId
params.description: Unique identifier for the search history entry.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure is designed to efficiently store and retrieve information about Indian states, monuments, user search history, and user data. The structure prioritizes Authorization Independence by avoiding hierarchical authorization dependencies (`get()`). User-owned data is stored in hierarchical paths for simple ownership-based security rules. Collaborative data uses membership maps. Segregation is achieved by using different collections for states, monuments, and user data. The design anticipates secure list operations.  Denormalization involves copying state IDs into monument documents. User search history is stored in a user-owned subcollection to allow users to view only their data. This structure facilitates secure and scalable data management.
